summary: Review #5 feedback from greptile-apps[bot] addressed correctly: (1) CONSTRAINTS path in apply-constraint-overrides.sh fixed from bare filename to releases/${RELEASE}/upper-constraints.txt, (2) extra-packages.yaml warning comment strengthened to explicitly state pip_packages does NOT auto-install, (3) all 6 test workdirs in test_apply_constraint_overrides.sh updated to mirror real repo directory structure under releases/2025.2/, (4) new sync test added in verify_release_config.sh that extracts and compares pip extras between extra-packages.yaml and Dockerfile. All 17 constraint override tests pass. All 6 release config tests pass.

tests_checklist.item: All 6 release config verification tests pass (including new sync test)
Test fixtures mirror real repository directory structure (releases/2025.2/)
Edge cases covered: missing file, comments/blanks, multiple overrides, package removal
New sync test validates pip extras match between extra-packages.yaml and Dockerfile

code_quality_checklist.item: CONSTRAINTS path now consistent with OVERRIDES pattern (both use release subdirectory)
Warning comment in extra-packages.yaml is prominent and actionable
Sync test extraction logic correct for both YAML and Dockerfile sources
No dead code or unnecessary changes

security_checklist.item: Package names properly escaped for sed patterns
No hardcoded secrets or path traversal vulnerabilities

architecture_checklist.item: Changes stay within review feedback scope — no scope creep
Error message now shows correct path (releases/${RELEASE}/upper-constraints.txt)
Review patterns documented for future reviews

fail_fast_checklist.item: Script exits immediately if constraints file missing
Test reports FAIL and returns early if required files missing

defensive_checklist.item: Sync test handles missing files gracefully
Both YAML extraction and Dockerfile extraction sort before comparing

metadata.title: C001: Add Keystone container image and release config
